_comment: Defines the handled Dialogflow intents and the RAG query templates used when a condition name is available. Add new intents here; the webhook routes them automatically without code changes.

rag_query_templates._comment: f-string style templates. {condition} is replaced with the display name.
rag_query_templates.getsymptoms: What are the clinical symptoms and presentation of {condition}?
rag_query_templates.getdiagnosis: How is {condition} diagnosed? What tests and workup are used?
rag_query_templates.gettreatment: What is the treatment and management of {condition}?
rag_query_templates.getriskfactors: What are the risk factors for {condition}?
rag_query_templates.geturgency: How urgent and life-threatening is {condition}? What are the time-critical aspects?
rag_query_templates.getdifferentiation: How do you differentiate {condition} from similar conditions?
